tasks.label: recreate-docker-lan-stack
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d --force-recreate

tasks.label: check-docker-ps
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml ps

tasks.label: verify-lan-endpoints
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && echo '[version]' && curl -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:18081/version | head -c 300 && echo && echo '[servers]' && curl -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:18081/servers | head -c 300 && echo && echo '[patch-head]' && curl -I -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:81/patch/ | head -n 5

tasks.label: verify-lan-http-headers
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && echo '[version-head]' && curl -I -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:18081/version | head -n 8 && echo '[servers-head]' && curl -I -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:18081/servers | head -n 8 && echo '[patch-version-plist]' && curl -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:81/patch/3/res/version.plist | head -n 12 && echo '[gm-head]' && curl -I -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:81/gm | head -n 8

tasks.label: verify-login-port-and-gm
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && echo '[tcp-16666]' && (nc -vz -w 3 192.168.1.13 16666 2>&1 || true) && echo '[tcp-16667]' && (nc -vz -w 3 192.168.1.13 16667 2>&1 || true) && echo '[gm-slash-head]' && curl -I -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:81/gm/ | head -n 8

tasks.label: check-login-endpoints
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && echo '[GET /game/login]' && curl -i -sS --max-time 8 http://192.168.1.13:18081/game/login | head -n 40 && echo '[POST /game/login empty]' && curl -i -sS --max-time 8 -X POST http://192.168.1.13:18081/game/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' | head -n 60

tasks.label: tail-login-childlogs
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && ls -1t mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/login_server*-stderr* mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/login_server*-stdout* 2>/dev/null | head -n 4 | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "===== {} ====="; tail -n 80 "{}"; echo'

tasks.label: tail-game-childlogs
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && ls -1t mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server*-stderr* mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server*-stdout* 2>/dev/null | head -n 6 | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "===== {} ====="; tail -n 80 "{}"; echo'

tasks.label: supervisor-status
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime supervisorctl -c /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/supervisord.conf status | sed -n '1,120p'

tasks.label: inspect-loginmap-files
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && ls -la mnt/pokemon/release/loginmap && find mnt/pokemon/release/loginmap -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed -n '1,120p'

tasks.label: tail-runtime-childlogs-in-container
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc 'ls -la /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog | head -n 80; echo; ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog | head -n 12; echo; for f in $(ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog | head -n 8); do echo "===== $f ====="; tail -n 80 "/mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/$f"; echo; done'

tasks.label: grep-login-errors-in-container
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc "grep -RinE 'error|exception|panic|fail|login|network|interrupted' /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog | tail -n 120"

tasks.label: inspect-lz4-module
tasks.command:
cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime python2 - <<'PY'
import lz4
print('lz4 module:', lz4)
print('lz4 file:', getattr(lz4, '__file__', 'n/a'))
print('has uncompress:', hasattr(lz4, 'uncompress'))
print('has decompress:', hasattr(lz4, 'decompress'))
print('attrs sample:', [x for x in dir(lz4) if x in ('compress','uncompress','decompress','loads','dumps','block','frame')])
try:
    import lz4.block as b
    print('lz4.block has decompress:', hasattr(b, 'decompress'))
except Exception as e:
    print('lz4.block import err:', e)
PY

tasks.label: inspect-lz4-module-oneliner
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime python2 -c "import lz4;import sys;print('file=%s'%getattr(lz4,'__file__','n/a'));print('uncompress=%s'%hasattr(lz4,'uncompress'));print('decompress=%s'%hasattr(lz4,'decompress'));import lz4.block as b;print('block.decompress=%s'%hasattr(b,'decompress'))"

tasks.label: inspect-lz4-compress
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime python2 -c "import lz4;print('compress=%s'%hasattr(lz4,'compress'));import lz4.block as b;print('block.compress=%s'%hasattr(b,'compress'))"

tasks.label: restart-game-login-services
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime supervisorctl -c /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/supervisord.conf restart game_server1 game_server2 login_server1 login_server2 && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime supervisorctl -c /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/supervisord.conf status | egrep 'game_server1|game_server2|login_server1|login_server2'

tasks.label: verify-wnet-lz4-helpers
tasks.command:
cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime python2 - <<'PY'
from framework import wnet
s='hello'*20
c=wnet._lz4_compress(s)
d=wnet._lz4_uncompress(c)
print('roundtrip_ok=%s'% (d==s))
print('compressed_len=%d original_len=%d'% (len(c), len(s)))
PY

tasks.label: tail-game-log-after-restart
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc 'f=$(ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server1-stdout* | head -n 1); echo "FILE=$f"; tail -n 120 "$f" | egrep -n "uncompress|Traceback|readBody error|game/login|Start OK|Conn Close" || true'

tasks.label: verify-loaded-wnet-module
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc "cd /mnt/pokemon/release/src && python2 -c 'import framework.wnet as w; print(w.__file__); print(hasattr(w, \"_lz4_uncompress\")); print(hasattr(w, \"_lz4_compress\"))'"

tasks.label: tail-fresh-game-log
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc 'f=$(ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server1-stdout* | head -n 1); echo "FILE=$f"; tail -n 40 "$f"'

tasks.label: check-new-uncompress-errors
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc 'f=$(ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server1-stdout* | head -n 1); echo "FILE=$f"; tail -n 200 "$f" | egrep -n "AttributeError|uncompress|readBody error|/game/login" || echo "no recent matching errors"'

tasks.label: tail-login1-log
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc 'f=$(ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/login_server1-stdout* | head -n 1); echo "FILE=$f"; tail -n 200 "$f"'

tasks.label: tail-login2-log
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc 'f=$(ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/login_server2-stdout* | head -n 1); echo "FILE=$f"; tail -n 200 "$f"'

tasks.label: grep-auth-session-errors
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc "grep -RinE 'session not existed|auth_error|/game/login|login\.cn|token|session' /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/login_server*-stdout* /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server*-stdout* | tail -n 200"

tasks.label: tail-latest-game1-80
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc 'f=$(ls -1t /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server1-stdout* | head -n 1); echo "FILE=$f"; tail -n 80 "$f"'

tasks.label: grep-game1-log-lines
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc "grep -nE 'uncompress|ERR /game/login|REQ 1 .* /game/login' /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server1-stdout---supervisor-rjj1qp.log | tail -n 30"

tasks.label: grep-post-login-requests
tasks.command: cd lyzwlkjvip && docker exec pokemon-game-runtime sh -lc "grep -nE '/game/role/guide/newbie|/game/role/newbie/init|/game/role/newbie/card/choose' /mnt/pokemon/deploy_dev/childlog/game_server1-stdout---supervisor-rjj1qp.log | tail -n 20"
